app_subtitle: A thinking analysis tool based on *Beyond Feelings*
api_key_help: Can also be set via the OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable
base_url_label: API Base URL (optional, leave blank for official endpoint)
input_placeholder: Enter the text you want to analyse (an opinion, news article, argument, etc.)…
error_no_key: ⚠️ Please enter your API Key in the sidebar first.
error_no_text: ⚠️ Please enter some text to analyse.
error_quota:
❌ API quota exceeded or not enabled!

Please check the quota and billing settings for your current provider (**{provider}**):
- **OpenAI**: [Billing](https://platform.openai.com/account/billing)
- **Google Gemini**: Confirm your API Key is enabled at [Google AI Studio](https://aistudio.google.com/apikey)
- **Zhipu**: [Console](https://open.bigmodel.cn/)
- **DeepSeek**: [Top up](https://platform.deepseek.com/)
error_auth: ❌ Invalid or expired API Key. Please check and re-enter it.
error_rate_limit: ⏳ API rate limited (auto-retried multiple times). Please wait 1–2 minutes and try again.
error_context_too_long: ❌ Input too long — exceeds the model's context window. Please use shorter text or switch to a model with a larger context.
book_no_books: No PDF files found. Please place PDFs in the book/ directory.
book_select_chapter: 👈 Select a chapter to view its content
qa_subtitle: Enter a book name and ask questions — AI will answer based on its knowledge of the book
qa_input_placeholder: Enter your question, e.g.: What is critical thinking? How to identify logical fallacies?…
qa_context_note: The above answer is generated based on *{book}*
tts_subtitle: Enter text and choose a voice to read it aloud
tts_no_text: ⚠️ Please enter text to read aloud.
